name: Alate Fashion
desc: Alate Fashion is a fashion brand with a unique female target market. They wanted a brand identity that communicated elegance and comfort, remaining timeless and appealing to a wide range of income earners. Our logotype and font pairs made sure to capture the elegance of the brand, while the colour palette was carefully chosen for comfort and accessibility with a friendly tone. The client was promptly impressed and quite satisfied with their decision to work with me.
